name: Takamiya Co., Ltd.
summary: Takamiya Co., Ltd. sells and rents temporary equipment and materials for the construction sites in Japan and internationally. It operates through Rental Business, Overseas Business, and Sales Business segments. The company's temporary equipment include YT lock system that can be erected along slopes, as well as used as a gantry; VMAX, a hanging-type scaffolding that is used for bridge repair; G Walk, a catwalk panel with fewer gaps to prevent stumbling and falling objects; and dimple post X, which protects the safety and lives of workers while they are under the beams for work, including steel construction and ridge beam operations. Its temporary equipment also includes clamps, a bolted fastening-type metal fittings; standing bear that enables safe assembly and disassembly; power frame, a wedge-type support system that fits the shape of a structure flexibly; lift climber, a mechanical scaffold for skyscrapers; Iq systems; and AL-speeders. In addition, the company provides stainless steel column formwork; building and agricultural materials; and environmental equipment, such as echo barrier, a soundproof sheet that reduces noise by absorbing sound, and H2 systems. Further, it plans and draws temporary construction. The company was formerly known as SRG Takamiya Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Takamiya Co., Ltd. in April 2019. Takamiya Co., Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
